Rough bedtime tonight. Took 45 minutes of rocking to get him down, then up
every 90 minutes after that. He's not sick — just fussy. Probably a growth spurt.
Running on three hours of sleep over here.

---

Better nap this afternoon. Two full hours in the bassinet without waking. I
actually got to eat lunch sitting down. Small wins.
